title: deep-command @general + setup hard-blocker gates
description: Add two un-skippable markdown HARD-BLOCK gates to all 7 deep commands: Gate 1 Phase 0 @general-agent verification (added to the 5 that lacked it: context, research, review, ask-ai-council, skill-benchmark) and Gate 2 the BLOCKED unified setup phase (STOP/wait in :confirm, fail-fast in :auto), ordered before any YAML/Run step. Standardizes the 2 existing commands (fixes the broken model-benchmark display box, normalizes setup STATUS markers). No YAML dispatch logic or skill behavior changed.
